buildCommand: git clone -b stable --depth 1 https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git /tmp/flutter && /tmp/flutter/bin/flutter config --enable-web && /tmp/flutter/bin/flutter pub get && /tmp/flutter/bin/flutter build web --release --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=$API_BASE_URL
installCommand: echo 'skipping default install, Flutter handles its own deps'
